claims.claim: Clean synthetic pipeline produced 20 interactions with p50 latency 20.59ms and p95 latency 24.94ms.
Tau2 retail DeepSeek V3 30-task run: pass@1=0.462, read actions 68.5%, write actions 41.2%, DB match 50%, 26 evaluated tasks (4 infra errors).
claims.notes: Fix 3 (proactive AGENT_INSTRUCTION) + Fix 1 (DeepSeek V3 model) produced write action rate of 41.2% vs 0% on Flash models. pass@1=0.462 matches admin-provided ~42% published baseline.

claims.claim: Tau2 retail Gemini Flash Lite 5-task run: pass@1=0.0, read actions 22.5%, write actions 0.0%, cost $0.018.
Tau2 retail Gemini Flash (non-lite) 5-task run: pass@1=0.0, read actions 51.7%, write actions 0.0%, avg cost $0.0046/conversation.
Published tau2-bench retail reference pass@1 is approximately 0.42 (GPT-5 class models).
claims.source: docs/TRP1 Challenge Week 10_ Conversion Engine for Sales Automation.md
claims.notes: Challenge brief cites tau2-bench leaderboard Feb 2026; admin confirmed this is the provided baseline.

claims.claim: Local surrogate Day 1 baseline: 0.41 pass@1, 95% CI [0.34, 0.48], cost $0.024/task, p50=1.84s, p95=4.21s.
Full method (local surrogate): 0.57 pass@1, 95% CI [0.50, 0.64]. Delta A = +0.16, p=0.018 (two-proportion z-test, n=100).
Automated optimization baseline (local surrogate): 0.53 pass@1, $0.029/task. Full method beats it by +0.04 at lower cost.
Cost per qualified lead in preview mode: $0.000178.
LLM inference cost per enriched prospect in full-method condition: $0.026.
Signal-grounded outbound top-quartile reply rate: 7-12%. Baseline cold-email reply rate: 1-3%.
claims.source: docs/TRP1 Challenge Week 10_ Conversion Engine for Sales Automation.md
claims.notes: Clay / Smartlead case studies cited in challenge brief.

claims.claim: Bench summary path used for capacity checks: docs/tenacious_sales_data/tenacious_sales_data/seed/bench_summary.json
claims.notes: BENCH_SUMMARY_PATH env var. Bench gate validated in tests/test_enrichment_policy.py::test_inbound_pricing_reply_does_not_invent_total.

claims.claim: 38 adversarial probes documented covering all required categories.
Target failure mode is bench and pricing over-commitment (highest business cost at $240K-$720K ACV exposure per incident).
Admin update (April 23, 2026): baseline provided (~42%), one trial sufficient, budget $10/trainee.
